title: Enovix Stock Drops Despite Beating Q1 Estimates: Details
text: Despite Enovix beating Wall Street estimates on both EPS and revenue, the stock dropped roughly 17% after hours following its latest report on May 13. This disappointing reaction reflects investor concerns about the company's path to profitability. JPMorgan downgraded Enovix to Underweight from Neutral ahead of Q1, flagging rising smartphone battery competition and a fading energy-density lead. Meanwhile, Wall Street still shows an average Overweight rating on Enovix with a consensus target of $15.39, well above recent trading levels. The stock reaction highlights a key tension: while the company beat earnings expectations and showed progress in commercialization, investors remain focused on the larger question of when Enovix will achieve profitability and reduce cash burn.
